LanguageData.VSEWW_GoodResourceDrop.description: Cargo pods drop 500 wood, 500 steel, 30 components, 200 plasteel, 10 FSX and 10 Prometheum
LanguageData.VSEWW_ExcellentResourceDrop.description: Cargo pods drop 1000 wood, 1000 steel, 60 components, 20 advanced components, 300 plasteel, 25 FSX and 25 Prometheum
LanguageData.VSEWW_LegendaryResourceDrop.description: Cargo pods drop 3000 wood, 3000 steel, 100 components, 50 advanced components, 500 plasteel, 100 FSX and 100 Prometheum
